=== label_with_ansi_color
# Label containing ANSI color codes should render the text correctly,
# not display escape sequences as visible characters.
mode: layout
width: 30
height: 5
--- js
var Game = {
    load: function(s) {},
    layout: function(playerID, w, h) {
        return {
            type: "label",
            text: "\x1b[31mRed\x1b[0m and \x1b[32mGreen\x1b[0m",
            align: "left"
        };
    }
};
---
===
╔════════════════════════════╗
║Red and Green               ║
║                            ║
║                            ║
╚════════════════════════════╝

=== label_centered_ansi
# Centered label with ANSI — alignment should use visible width, not byte length.
mode: layout
width: 30
height: 5
--- js
var Game = {
    load: function(s) {},
    layout: function(playerID, w, h) {
        return {
            type: "label",
            text: "\x1b[33mHello\x1b[0m",
            align: "center"
        };
    }
};
---
===
╔════════════════════════════╗
║           Hello            ║
║                            ║
║                            ║
╚════════════════════════════╝

=== table_with_ansi_cells
# Table cells containing ANSI colors — column widths should be based on
# visible character count, not raw string length.
mode: layout
width: 30
height: 7
--- js
var Game = {
    load: function(s) {},
    layout: function(playerID, w, h) {
        return {
            type: "table",
            rows: [
                ["\x1b[1m\x1b[37mAlice\x1b[0m", "\x1b[38;5;136m$500\x1b[0m"],
                ["\x1b[2mBob\x1b[0m",             "\x1b[38;5;136m$1200\x1b[0m"]
            ]
        };
    }
};
---
===
╔════════════════════════════╗
║Alice $500                  ║
║Bob   $1200                 ║
║                            ║
║                            ║
║                            ║
╚════════════════════════════╝

=== panel_with_ansi_labels
# Panel containing labels with ANSI codes — borders drawn by Go,
# content painted via PaintANSI.
mode: layout
width: 30
height: 7
--- js
var Game = {
    load: function(s) {},
    layout: function(playerID, w, h) {
        return {
            type: "panel",
            title: "Scores",
            children: [
                { type: "label", text: "\x1b[36mCyan text\x1b[0m" },
                { type: "label", text: "Plain text" }
            ]
        };
    }
};
---
===
╔════════════════════════════╗
║╔═ Scores ═════════════════╗║
║║Cyan text                 ║║
║║Plain text                ║║
║║                          ║║
║╚══════════════════════════╝║
╚════════════════════════════╝

=== render_writestring_ansi
# buf.writeString with ANSI escape codes — should parse colors, not
# render escape bytes as visible characters.
mode: text
width: 20
height: 3
--- js
var Game = {
    load: function(s) {},
    renderAscii: function(buf, playerID, x, y, w, h) {
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "\x1b[31mRed\x1b[0m \x1b[32mGreen\x1b[0m", null, null);
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════╗
║Red Green         ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== hsplit_gameview_and_panel
# Horizontal split: left half is a gameview (render() paints ANSI text),
# right half is a panel with ANSI labels. Tests both rendering paths.
mode: layout
width: 40
height: 7
--- js
var Game = {
    load: function(s) {},
    renderAscii: function(buf, playerID, x, y, w, h) {
        buf.writeString(0, 0, "\x1b[31mR\x1b[32mG\x1b[34mB\x1b[0m line", null, null);
        buf.writeString(0, 1, "row 2", null, null);
    },
    layout: function(playerID, w, h) {
        return {
            type: "hsplit",
            children: [
                { type: "gameview", weight: 1 },
                {
                    type: "panel", title: "Info", width: 16,
                    children: [
                        { type: "label", text: "\x1b[33mGold\x1b[0m: 42" }
                    ]
                }
            ]
        };
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════════════════════════╗
║RGB line              ╔═ Info ═══════╗║
║row 2                 ║Gold: 42      ║║
║                      ║              ║║
║                      ║              ║║
║                      ╚══════════════╝║
╚══════════════════════════════════════╝
